description:
Vital Recorder is open with VitalDB Case #6 loaded, containing physiological data from a surgical case. Calculate hemodynamic indices at three specific timepoints: 00:15:00, 00:45:00, and 01:15:00. For each timepoint, record the Heart Rate (HR), Systolic Blood Pressure (SBP), and Diastolic Blood Pressure (DBP), then calculate the Shock Index (HR / SBP) and Pulse Pressure (SBP - DBP). Create a text file report at 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\hemodynamic_indices_report.txt' using the exact format below:

HEMODYNAMIC INDICES REPORT
Case: VitalDB #6
==========================

Timepoint 1: 00:15:00
  HR: [value] bpm
  SBP: [value] mmHg
  DBP: [value] mmHg
  Shock Index: [value]
  Pulse Pressure: [value] mmHg

Timepoint 2: 00:45:00
  HR: [value] bpm
  SBP: [value] mmHg
  DBP: [value] mmHg
  Shock Index: [value]
  Pulse Pressure: [value] mmHg

Timepoint 3: 01:15:00
  HR: [value] bpm
  SBP: [value] mmHg
  DBP: [value] mmHg
  Shock Index: [value]
  Pulse Pressure: [value] mmHg
